title: Supplier Prequalification Notice 2026-2027
description: Akiba Commercial Bank Plc wishes to prequalify competent suppliers for the supply and delivery of various goods and services for a two-year period across 40 categories including office stationery, ICT equipment, cleaning services, construction, legal services, and more. The prequalification exercise is conducted online via TenderSure platform.
eligibility: Open to all suppliers. Existing suppliers must also participate. Participation fee: TSH 100,000.00 per category (non-refundable, paid online).

Supply of Drinking Water for Dispensers
